rationale: Ground truth closed #4891 as a duplicate of #4808, not as already-fixed-by-#4810. X confidently asserts the bug is 'already fixed on main' via #4810 and fabricates verified line-numbered code/comments as proof, directly contradicting the issue's own title ('missed by #4810') and the actual duplicate-of-#4808 resolution. Y correctly reasons that #4810 fixed only 4 of 5 call sites, explains why routing to #4808 (not #4810) is the right closure, and honestly flags that #4808 never merged and the regression test has a coverage gap — matching the thread's actual outcome while being transparent about what it could and couldn't verify.
